items.definition_en: A carrot is a long orange vegetable.
items.example_en: I put a carrot in my salad.

items.definition_en: A potato is a round vegetable that grows in the ground.
items.example_en: She makes soup with a potato.

items.definition_en: An onion is a round vegetable with many layers.
items.example_en: He cuts an onion for dinner.

items.definition_en: A tomato is a red vegetable that is often used in salads.
items.example_en: I eat a tomato with my sandwich.

items.definition_en: Cabbage is a round green or purple leafy vegetable.
items.example_en: He cooks cabbage for lunch.

items.definition_en: Lettuce is a green leafy vegetable used in salads.
items.example_en: I like to have lettuce in my salad.

items.definition_en: A cucumber is a long green vegetable that is cool and crisp.
items.example_en: She slices a cucumber for the salad.

items.definition_en: Broccoli is a green vegetable with small tree-like heads.
items.example_en: I eat broccoli with rice.

items.definition_en: A pepper is a colorful vegetable that can be sweet or spicy.
items.example_en: He adds a pepper to the dish.

items.definition_en: A pea is a small round green vegetable.
items.example_en: We put pea in the soup.

items.definition_en: Spinach is a green leafy vegetable full of vitamins.
items.example_en: I add spinach to my omelet.

items.definition_en: A pumpkin is a large round orange vegetable.
items.example_en: A pumpkin is used to make soup.

items.definition_en: Cauliflower is a white vegetable with many small flowers.
items.example_en: I cook cauliflower for dinner.

items.definition_en: A bean is a small seed from a vegetable that comes in different colors.
items.example_en: He eats a bean with his meal.

items.definition_en: Zucchini is a long green vegetable sometimes called courgette.
items.example_en: She fries zucchini in olive oil.

items.definition_en: Celery is a green vegetable with long crisp stalks.
items.example_en: He eats celery as a snack.

items.definition_en: An eggplant is a purple vegetable with smooth skin.
items.example_en: She adds eggplant to the stew.

items.definition_en: A radish is a small red or white vegetable with a spicy taste.
items.example_en: I put radish in my salad.

items.definition_en: Asparagus is a long green vegetable often served cooked.
items.example_en: We have asparagus for dinner.

items.definition_en: Parsley is a green leafy vegetable often used in salads.
items.example_en: I think parsley is a good addition to my salad.

items.definition_en: A sweet potato is an orange vegetable that tastes sweet.
items.example_en: I like to bake a sweet potato.
